title: SendMessage
description: Action: `send_message`. Submits a user message to the active session. The server immediately acknowledges with `immediate_response` (status 202), then emits zero or more `stream_chunk` / `stream_token` events as the agent workflow runs, and finally emits `eventual_response` (status 200) with the terminal output. If the agent requires human confirmation mid-stream, a `write_confirmation_required` event is sent and processing pauses until the client sends `confirm_tool_action`.

Request.title: SendMessageRequest
Request.description: Fields sent by the client to submit a message.

requestId.description: Client-generated correlation ID echoed back on all related events.

message.description: The user's message text. Between 1 and 10 000 characters.

stream.description: Whether to receive incremental `stream_chunk` and `stream_token` events. Defaults to `true`. Set to `false` to receive only the final `eventual_response`.

Response.title: SendMessageResponse
Response.description: Data payload carried in the terminal `eventual_response` event for this action. Also see `GeneralAgentResponse` for the structured response shape.

messageId.description: ID of the agent's response message as persisted to the database.

needsEscalation.description: True if the agent flagged this turn for human escalation.

GeneralAgentResponse.title: GeneralAgentResponse
GeneralAgentResponse.description: Structured output from the default general-purpose agent template. Agents built on custom templates may extend or replace this shape.

responseParts.description: Ordered text segments that together form the agent's reply. Clients may join them or render each separately.

customerHappinessScore.description: Estimated customer happiness for this turn (0 = very unhappy, 1 = very happy).

needsSatisfactionScore.description: Estimated degree to which the customer's needs were met (0 = not met, 1 = fully met).

requestSummary.description: One-sentence summary of what the user requested.

resolutionStatus.description: The agent's assessment of where the conversation stands after this turn.

suggestedNextActions.description: Ordered list of suggested follow-up actions the client UI may surface to the user.
